docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-08-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBBINS, ARIEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-12-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JIBRAN MUSHTAQ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARIEL ROBBINS IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506) (FILE RETAINED IN D.506 TICKLER)
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S TRIAL BRIEF RECD AT WINDOW VIA MESSENGER; WILL BE SUBMITTED AS EXHIBITS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSHTAQ, JIBRAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBBINS, ARIEL $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,575.00, DEFENDANT CAUSED DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF VEHICLE. PER KELLEY BLUE BOOK VALUATION AND ALL PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT THE DIMINISHMENT OF VALUE IS $4500 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO HEARD BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MUSHTAQ, JIBRAN ROBBINS, ARIEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2022 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF JIBRAN MUSHTAQ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARIEL ROBBINS IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROBBINS, ARIEL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,063.00 FILED BY MUSHTAQ, JIBRAN AS TO DEFENDANT ROBBINS, ARIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE.
